title: ToB Sales / Senior / Strong / Complex deal

candidate_profile.domain_background: Manufacturing digitalization and enterprise software sales
candidate_profile.target_role_summary: Senior ToB seller experienced in complex-account penetration and multi-stakeholder deals
candidate_profile.current_context: Applying for a role expected to independently break large accounts and drive complex deal cycles

outline.quality_expectation: must explain incumbent and why entry was hard
must explain why diagnosis came before pitching
must explain early signals and inference
must explain mapping and interview approach
must explain concrete resistance and response
must explain relationship map and role-specific value framing
must explain pilot narrowing and commercial motion
must separate sales contribution from delivery contribution
must explain failure mechanism and changes
must explain earlier ROI and procurement involvement

expected_disc.notes: The sample should show clear push, influence, and commercial judgment while remaining structured.
expected_disc.surface_vs_validated: Both surface and validated style should remain high D/I rather than being dismissed as only good storytelling.

expected_findings: able to define the real problem instead of pitching too early
able to identify and manage a multi-role decision chain
able to read buying signals and convert them into deal motion
expected_followup_directions: ask how ROI logic was quantified in more detail
ask how objections differed across roles
ask how client expectations were managed during pilot execution
evaluation_focus: can the system recognize a genuinely strong ToB sales sample
can the system extract multi-stakeholder motion and buying signals
can the system produce high-value next-step follow-ups
notes: This should serve as a benchmark strong sample for ToB sales.
